recommendations.title: A Chinese Odyssey Part One: Pandora's Box
recommendations.overview: When the Goddess of Happiness tosses the Longevity Monk and his disciples out of heaven (because the Monkey King tried to attain immortality), the Monkey King is reincarnated as the Joker. He now spends his time chasing two jealous women. When one of

recommendations.title: Police Story 2
recommendations.overview: The Hong Kong super-cop must stop a group of blackmailing bombers at the same time that the villains of the first Police Story are out for revenge.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu League
recommendations.overview: A poor comic book artist summons four legendary Kung Fu masters to learn the highest level of martial arts and help him get his girl.

recommendations.title: The Feels
recommendations.overview: A lesbian bachelorette weekend goes awry when one of the brides admits she's never had an orgasm.

recommendations.title: Fallen Angels
recommendations.overview: An assassin goes through obstacles as he attempts to escape his violent lifestyle despite the opposition of his partner, who is secretly attracted to him.

recommendations.title: Big Brother
recommendations.overview: A soldier-turned-high school teacher uses unusual methods to reach to a class of poor students, while dealing with a greedy entrepreneur and his gang of fighters as well as the government.

recommendations.title: Chungking Express
recommendations.overview: Two melancholic Hong Kong policemen fall in love: one with a mysterious underworld figure, the other with a beautiful and ethereal server at a late-night restaurant.

recommendations.title: Yolo
recommendations.overview: After an argument with her younger sister, Le Ying moves out on her own. She meets a boxing trainer and starts boxing.

recommendations.title: Fire Will Come
recommendations.overview: When Amador Coro gets out of prison for having provoked a fire, nobody is waiting for him. He returns to his home town, a small village hidden in the mountains of rural Galicia, to live with his elder mother, Benedicta, and three cows. Life goes on c

recommendations.title: Nekromantik
recommendations.overview: A necrophilic street sweeper who cleans up after grisly accidents brings home a corpse for him and his girlfriend to enjoy sexually, but is dismayed to see that she prefers the corpse over him.
